evidence.text: AI models (or humans) on New York Times *Connections* puzzles. ## Overview This project provides a comprehensive evaluation framework for testing linguistic reasoning capabilities using *Connections* puzzles. It supports 200+ AI models through a unified OpenRouter integration and includes both batch evaluation and interactive modes. ## Features - **Multi-model support**: Access 200+ AI models through OpenRouter (OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Google Gemini, and more) - **Reasoning model support**: Full support for reasoning models (GPT-5, o3, Grok-4, etc.) with proper parameter handling - **Parallel execution**:
